records.m_Talk_ENG: It's obvious. They don't even know what it is, but since the Administration is after it, they targeted it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Like this.

records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey! Stop hurting innocent citizens!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I came in through the main entrance! Looks like you evil doers don't have any sense of law and order, so you didn't even lock the entrance properly.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, you need to wait patiently and not go out alone, okay?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is this the recently secured item?

records.m_Talk_FRA: Is this the recently secured item?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's a top-tier item guaranteed by the Administration. It was a real struggle to get it out of their hands.

records.m_Talk_FRA: It's a top-tier item guaranteed by the Administration. It was a real struggle to get it out of their hands.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Check it for me, old man.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Check it for me, old man.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah, sure.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah, sure.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah, sure.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's emitting trace amounts of Corruption ray, so this is definitely an item from the Counterside. It's not a counterfeit.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's emitting trace amounts of Corruption ray, so this is definitely an item from the Counterside. It's not a counterfeit.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's emitting trace amounts of Corruption ray, so this is definitely an item from the Counterside. It's not a counterfeit.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It looks like stone on the outside, but the elements making up this form don't exist in the Normalside. According to the Administration's standards, this qualifies as an Artifact.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It looks like stone on the outside, but the elements making up this form don't exist in the Normalside. According to the Administration's standards, this qualifies as an Artifact.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It looks like stone on the outside, but the elements making up this form don't exist in the Normalside. According to the Administration's standards, this qualifies as an Artifact.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I think you've checked it enough, so if you want to keep examining it, let's finish the deal first.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I think you've checked it enough, so if you want to keep examining it, let's finish the deal first.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I think you've checked it enough, so if you want to keep examining it, let's finish the deal first.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If this is really an Artifact, rebuilding my organization will be a breeze.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If this is really an Artifact, rebuilding my organization will be a breeze.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If this is really an Artifact, rebuilding my organization will be a breeze.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We could use this to strike a deal with the Administration to rise back up to prominence. It shouldn't be that hard.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We could use this to strike a deal with the Administration to rise back up to prominence. It shouldn't be that hard.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We could use this to strike a deal with the Administration to rise back up to prominence. It shouldn't be that hard.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Okay, let's make a deal.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, thank you. Then...

records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, thank you. Then...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wait a minute, this amount is different from what we discussed, isn't it? It's only a quarter!

records.m_Talk_FRA: Wait a minute, this amount is different from what we discussed, isn't it? It's only a quarter!

records.m_Talk_DEU: Just because it's an Artifact doesn't mean you can set the price of an untested item at full value.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Just because it's an Artifact doesn't mean you can set the price of an untested item at full value.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you hold onto it, all you'll do is become a target for the Administration. Isn't it better to hand it over to me and avoid that risk?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Garren Maxwell, a Grade B Counter and a former member of a TASKFORCE.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Garren Maxwell, a Grade B Counter and a former member of a TASKFORCE.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Garren Maxwell, a Grade B Counter and a former member of a TASKFORCE.

records.m_Talk_ENG: After failing to attempt to cover up his superior's death as a Dive accident and commit an insurance scam, he killed the witnesses and went into hiding.
records.m_Talk_DEU: After failing to attempt to cover up his superior's death as a Dive accident and commit an insurance scam, he killed the witnesses and went into hiding.
records.m_Talk_FRA: After failing to attempt to cover up his superior's death as a Dive accident and commit an insurance scam, he killed the witnesses and went into hiding.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Since then, he's been working as a hitman in the Underground... Or at least, he was.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Since then, he's been working as a hitman in the Underground... Or at least, he was.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I didn't expect him to have been taken down by someone right after arriving.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I didn't expect him to have been taken down by someone right after arriving.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I didn't expect him to have been taken down by someone right after arriving.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's obvious. They don't even know what it is, but since the Administration is after it, they targeted it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Since we don't know the amount of the reward for the request, should we wait for the Administration's notice?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I came in through the main entrance! Looks like you evil doers don't have any sense of law and order, so you didn't even lock the entrance properly.

root.m_Talk_DEU: Take this! Counter kick!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Wow...! That's amazing.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Wow...! That's amazing.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So, you need to wait patiently and not go out alone, okay?
root.m_Talk_DEU: So, you need to wait patiently and not go out alone, okay?

root.m_Talk_FRA: Is this the recently secured item?

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's a top-tier item guaranteed by the Administration. It was a real struggle to get it out of their hands.

root.m_Talk_FRA: It's a top-tier item guaranteed by the Administration. It was a real struggle to get it out of their hands.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Check it for me, old man.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah, sure.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah, sure.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah, sure.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's emitting trace amounts of Corruption ray, so this is definitely an item from the Counterside. It's not a counterfeit.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's emitting trace amounts of Corruption ray, so this is definitely an item from the Counterside. It's not a counterfeit.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's emitting trace amounts of Corruption ray, so this is definitely an item from the Counterside. It's not a counterfeit.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It looks like stone on the outside, but the elements making up this form don't exist in the Normalside. According to the Administration's standards, this qualifies as an Artifact.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It looks like stone on the outside, but the elements making up this form don't exist in the Normalside. According to the Administration's standards, this qualifies as an Artifact.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It looks like stone on the outside, but the elements making up this form don't exist in the Normalside. According to the Administration's standards, this qualifies as an Artifact.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I think you've checked it enough, so if you want to keep examining it, let's finish the deal first.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I think you've checked it enough, so if you want to keep examining it, let's finish the deal first.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I think you've checked it enough, so if you want to keep examining it, let's finish the deal first.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If this is really an Artifact, rebuilding my organization will be a breeze.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If this is really an Artifact, rebuilding my organization will be a breeze.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If this is really an Artifact, rebuilding my organization will be a breeze.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We could use this to strike a deal with the Administration to rise back up to prominence. It shouldn't be that hard.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We could use this to strike a deal with the Administration to rise back up to prominence. It shouldn't be that hard.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We could use this to strike a deal with the Administration to rise back up to prominence. It shouldn't be that hard.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, thank you. Then...

root.m_Talk_FRA: Wait a minute, this amount is different from what we discussed, isn't it? It's only a quarter!

root.m_Talk_FRA: Just because it's an Artifact doesn't mean you can set the price of an untested item at full value.

root.m_Talk_ENG: B-boss... Help me...
root.m_Talk_DEU: B-boss... Help me...
root.m_Talk_FRA: B-boss... Help me...

root.m_Talk_ENG: You can't just act all arrogant relying on numbers.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You can't just act all arrogant relying on numbers.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You can't just act all arrogant relying on numbers.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So you were trying to act tough with just a bullet?
root.m_Talk_DEU: So you were trying to act tough with just a bullet?
root.m_Talk_FRA: So you were trying to act tough with just a bullet?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Tch... Dammit...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Tch... Dammit...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Tch... Dammit...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Half of your men are behind bars, and now you've lost the rest.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Half of your men are behind bars, and now you've lost the rest.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Half of your men are behind bars, and now you've lost the rest.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you're a Scavenger, you wouldn't have any ID. So killing you would leave no consequences, right?
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you're a Scavenger, you wouldn't have any ID. So killing you would leave no consequences, right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you're a Scavenger, you wouldn't have any ID. So killing you would leave no consequences, right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Wait! I'm a citizen of Ground One! I just happened to get this outfit for disguise purposes!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Wait! I'm a citizen of Ground One! I just happened to get this outfit for disguise purposes!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Wait! I'm a citizen of Ground One! I just happened to get this outfit for disguise purposes!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, I know.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, I know.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, I know.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You spared the Administration investigators when you brought the Artifact, didn't you? A real Scavenger wouldn't do anything stupid like leave any witnesses behind.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You spared the Administration investigators when you brought the Artifact, didn't you? A real Scavenger wouldn't do anything stupid like leave any witnesses behind.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You spared the Administration investigators when you brought the Artifact, didn't you? A real Scavenger wouldn't do anything stupid like leave any witnesses behind.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm the same. I don't plan on leaving anyone alive who knows the whereabouts of this Artifact.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm the same. I don't plan on leaving anyone alive who knows the whereabouts of this Artifact.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm the same. I don't plan on leaving anyone alive who knows the whereabouts of this Artifact.

root.m_Talk_ENG: N-no!
root.m_Talk_DEU: N-no!
root.m_Talk_FRA: N-no!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Don't come! Don't come any closer!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Don't come! Don't come any closer!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Don't come! Don't come any closer!

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>You... good.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>You... good.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>You... good.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>...I eat you!</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>...I eat you!</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>...I eat you!</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? What's that sound?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? What's that sound?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? What's that sound?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Wait... what's this? Why are there teeth coming out of the Artifact?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Wait... what's this? Why are there teeth coming out of the Artifact?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Wait... what's this? Why are there teeth coming out of the Artifact?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Eek?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Eek?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Eek?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Old man! What's this!? The Artifact is swallowing my arm!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Old man! What's this!? The Artifact is swallowing my arm!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Old man! What's this!? The Artifact is swallowing my arm!

root.m_Talk_ENG: What is this?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: What is this?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: What is this?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I-I don't know... This is the first time I've seen anything like this!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I-I don't know... This is the first time I've seen anything like this!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I-I don't know... This is the first time I've seen anything like this!

root.m_Talk_ENG: The meteorite... is swallowing a person?
root.m_Talk_DEU: The meteorite... is swallowing a person?
root.m_Talk_FRA: The meteorite... is swallowing a person?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh, get off! Get away from my body!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh, get off! Get away from my body!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh, get off! Get away from my body!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Aaaagh!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Aaaagh!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Aaaagh!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh...? Is he dead?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh...? Is he dead?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh...? Is he dead?

root.m_Talk_ENG: For whatever just happened, that person's appearance seems fine. The meteorite that was attached fell off again.
root.m_Talk_DEU: For whatever just happened, that person's appearance seems fine. The meteorite that was attached fell off again.
root.m_Talk_FRA: For whatever just happened, that person's appearance seems fine. The meteorite that was attached fell off again.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hey... doesn't it seem like the Artifact is getting bigger?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hey... doesn't it seem like the Artifact is getting bigger?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hey... doesn't it seem like the Artifact is getting bigger?

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: A human figure?
root.m_Talk_DEU: A human figure?
root.m_Talk_FRA: A human figure?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Keehee! Tasty!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Keehee! Tasty!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Keehee! Tasty!

root.m_Talk_ENG: A girl? Where did she come from?
root.m_Talk_DEU: A girl? Where did she come from?
root.m_Talk_FRA: A girl? Where did she come from?

root.m_Talk_ENG: No way... Did that meteorite change into her?
root.m_Talk_DEU: No way... Did that meteorite change into her?
root.m_Talk_FRA: No way... Did that meteorite change into her?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm still hungry!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm still hungry!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm still hungry!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I still want to munch more!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I still want to munch more!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I still want to munch more!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Munch...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Munch...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Munch...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Are you saying you beat that Counter?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Are you saying you beat that Counter?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Are you saying you beat that Counter?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes! The power that he had! It was tasty!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes! The power that he had! It was tasty!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes! The power that he had! It was tasty!

root.m_Talk_ENG: What are you? An Artifact...? A C.O...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What are you? An Artifact...? A C.O...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What are you? An Artifact...? A C.O...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Are you planning to hurt us too?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Are you planning to hurt us too?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Are you planning to hurt us too?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hurt you? Do you have something tasty inside too?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hurt you? Do you have something tasty inside too?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hurt you? Do you have something tasty inside too?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then I want to munch!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then I want to munch!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then I want to munch!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Eeek...! Don't come near me!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Eeek...! Don't come near me!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Eeek...! Don't come near me!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ah! Ouch!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ah! Ouch!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ah! Ouch!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Who hit me?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Who hit me?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Who hit me?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Garren Maxwell, a Grade B Counter and a former member of a TASKFORCE.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Garren Maxwell, a Grade B Counter and a former member of a TASKFORCE.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Garren Maxwell, a Grade B Counter and a former member of a TASKFORCE.

root.m_Talk_ENG: After failing to attempt to cover up his superior's death as a Dive accident and commit an insurance scam, he killed the witnesses and went into hiding.
root.m_Talk_DEU: After failing to attempt to cover up his superior's death as a Dive accident and commit an insurance scam, he killed the witnesses and went into hiding.
root.m_Talk_FRA: After failing to attempt to cover up his superior's death as a Dive accident and commit an insurance scam, he killed the witnesses and went into hiding.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Since then, he's been working as a hitman in the Underground... Or at least, he was.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Since then, he's been working as a hitman in the Underground... Or at least, he was.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Since then, he's been working as a hitman in the Underground... Or at least, he was.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I didn't expect him to have been taken down by someone right after arriving.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I didn't expect him to have been taken down by someone right after arriving.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I didn't expect him to have been taken down by someone right after arriving.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh?

root.m_Talk_ENG: H-hey! Help us!
root.m_Talk_DEU: H-hey! Help us!
root.m_Talk_FRA: H-hey! Help us!

root.m_Talk_ENG: That monster ate that criminal, and now she's targeting us too!
root.m_Talk_DEU: That monster ate that criminal, and now she's targeting us too!
root.m_Talk_FRA: That monster ate that criminal, and now she's targeting us too!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ate...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ate...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ate...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: You... look tasty.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You... look tasty.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You... look tasty.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You're good too.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You're good too.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You're good too.

root.m_Talk_ENG:
Good? What do you mean
8g
root.m_Talk_DEU:
Good? What do you mean
8g
root.m_Talk_FRA:
Good? What do you mean
8g

8vMunch!*

root.m_Talk_ENG: Tch!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Tch!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Tch!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh! What's that now? Why are those thorns coming out of her body?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh! What's that now? Why are those thorns coming out of her body?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh! What's that now? Why are those thorns coming out of her body?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hey! Get out of here if you don't want to die!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hey! Get out of here if you don't want to die!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hey! Get out of here if you don't want to die!
